signup.heading: Create your Budget account
signup.subtitle: One account, multiple budgets — private and shared.

locale.label: Display language
locale.helper: You can change this anytime in settings.

request.heading: Reset your password
request.body: Enter your account email. We'll send you a link. The link works for 30 minutes.
request.success: If that email is registered, a reset link is on its way. Check your inbox.

reset.expired: This reset link has expired. Request a new one — they're valid for 30 minutes.

banner.heading: Verify your email to continue
banner.body: We sent a link to {email}. Workspace creation and invitations unlock once you verify.

validation.email_invalid: Email isn't a valid address. Check the format and try again.
validation.password_min_length: Password must be at least 8 characters.

sessions.heading: Active sessions
sessions.empty: This is your only active session.

confirm.title: Sign out this session?
confirm.body: The signed-in device on {device} will be signed out immediately.

display_currency.label: Display currency
display_currency.helper: Used to show totals across multiple workspaces. Each workspace keeps its own currency for its own data.

llm.label: AI assistant
llm.helper: Used for the budget setup wizard and insights.

empty.heading: Create your first workspace
empty.body: A workspace holds one budget. Make a private one for yourself, or a shared one to plan with family.

currency.label: Default currency
currency.helper: This is permanent — every entry in this workspace settles in this currency.

switcher.label: Active workspaces
switcher.helper: Pick the workspaces you want to see. We'll remember this.
switcher.first_pick: Pick at least one workspace to start.

workspaces.verify_required: Verify your email first to create or join a workspace.

shares.heading: Contribution shares
shares.body: Set what portion of this workspace's budget each member is responsible for. Shares must add up to 100%.

error.already_member: {email} is already a member of this workspace.

confirm.title: Leave "{name}"?
confirm.body: You'll lose access to this workspace's data. The owner can re-invite you later.

confirm.title: Transfer ownership of "{name}"?
confirm.body: You will become a regular member. The new owner will have full control.

empty.heading: Nothing here yet
empty.body: Once you {action}, it'll show up here.

error.generic: Something went wrong. Try again — if it keeps happening, refresh the page.
error.network: You're offline. Changes will retry once you're back online.

onboarding.heading: Set up your first workspace
onboarding.subtitle: You're almost ready. Create a workspace to start tracking your budget.

dashboard.heading: Dashboard
dashboard.no_workspaces: No active workspaces selected. Use the workspace switcher to pick at least one.
